---
title: 'Every Day?'
date: '2013-04-06T03:56:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Call To Excellence'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2928857090961101106'
blogger_filename: '/2013/04/every-day.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Call To Excellence/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Digesting'
---

The key is consistency. Every day... I just don't know if I can do it everyday. I set out, in my mind, to go to work and be a shining example for Jesus... but then the pressure turns on and I fail. I curse under my breath and the stupidity of other employees, and how bad we treat our customers. How can I be a shining example that way?<br />
<br />
Grace, meditating on Grace not only helps you forgive past mistakes, even&nbsp;today's&nbsp; but it fills your heart with the strength to do better tomorrow. Just maybe, I'll do better tomorrow...
